title: MondayDoc Column in Card View
excerpt: Currently the Files column type is visible in Card views but the new MondayDoc column is not visible in Card views. Automatically adding a template to an item is only possible via MondayDoc column so it’s important to ha…

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently the Files column type is visible in Card views but the new MondayDoc column is not visible in Card views. Automatically adding a template to an item is only possible via MondayDoc column so it’s important to have this column available in table, card and kanban views.

posts.author: AndrasNagy (András Nagy)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! The same case here. I want to use a template, but then it isn’t available in the card view for the team. Why?

posts.author: MRad (M Rad)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m keen to see this also. Listing monday workDocs as standlone workspace objects has it’s drawbacks (eg not exported in the manual tenant download function). The mondayDoc column might solve some problems but uptake will be poor if it’s not viewable in the item card
